evalAfter: (async()=>{const w=ms=>new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,ms));const b=[...document.querySelectorAll('button,a')].find(el=>/Entrar a MOS/i.test(el.textContent||''));if(b)b.click();await w(2600);try{MOS.nav('config')}catch(e){}await w(2200);try{MOS.setCfgTab('infra')}catch(e){}await w(3800);const tabbar=document.querySelector('.tab-bar');const c=document.getElementById('infraContenedor');const re=/[+] operador|[+] cajero|[+] admin/;const out={tabs:tabbar?[...tabbar.querySelectorAll('.tab-btn')].map(t=>t.textContent.trim()):[],personalTab:!!document.getElementById('cfgTabPersonal'),addUserBtns:c?[...c.querySelectorAll('button')].filter(x=>re.test(x.textContent||'')).length:0,metaAlmEditable:c?!!c.querySelector('[data-meta-key="evalMetaAlmacenero"]'):false};out.ov=document.documentElement.scrollWidth>innerWidth+1;window.scrollTo(0,0);return out;})()
